name: Fill vector database
description: Lists all files in a local documentation directory recursively, then loops over each file, reads its contents, and loads it into a Pinecone vector database as a Markdown document, building a searchable knowledge base for retrieval-augmented generation.
shortDescription: Load a folder of documentation into a Pinecone vector database for RAG.
keyFeatures: Recursive filesystem listing of a documentation directory
Per-file loop over the discovered files
Pinecone vector ingestion of each file
prerequisites: Local filesystem access to the documentation directory
idealFor: Teams building a RAG knowledge base from a folder of Markdown documentation.
steps: List all files in the documentation directory recursively.
Loop over each file: read its contents and load it into the Pinecone vector database.
